questionHtml: State with a reason whether pangolins are autotrophic or heterotrophic.
markschemeHtml:
heterotrophic because it feeds on/eats food/other organisms /eats ants/termites/ doesn’t photosynthesise/does not produce its own food;

Do not accept “it is not autotrophic” as it is part of the stem question.

meta.title: State with a reason whether pangolins are autotrophic or heterotrophic.
breadcrumbLabels: C4.2. Transfers of energy and matter
C4.2.6. Autotrophs as organisms that use external energy sources to synthesize carbon compounds from simple inorganic substances
